failedAssertions.reason: Frontend sends companyId in CreateUserRequest payload but backend rejects with 400 'Unrecognized field companyId'. Create works via curl without companyId. Frontend needs to omit companyId from POST payload.
Frontend sends companyId in UpdateUserRequest payload but backend rejects with 400. Edit works via curl without companyId. Frontend needs to omit companyId from PUT payload.

frictions.description: Dropdown menu items could not be clicked via agent-browser click @ref — timed out consistently. Used JS eval to find and click buttons by text content as workaround.
Combobox/Select dropdown click sometimes doesn't open on first click via agent-browser — used JS eval to programmatically set values.
Network request log shows duplicate entries (6-17x per request) — likely React StrictMode double-rendering in dev mode plus Vite HMR.
frictions.resolution: Used presence/absence of requests rather than exact count
